summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2P Cryptocurrency Trading Platform - all core features working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test users and support tickets created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features tested and working. Backend: 27 API tests passed covering auth, trades, support tickets, user profile, payment methods, and admin endpoints. Frontend: All pages tested - Landing, Sign In, User Dashboard, Settings, Support, Trade History, P2P Trade, Admin Dashboard, Admin Trades, Admin Users, Admin Support. All 'Back to Dashboard' navigation links present.

features_tested.user_registration_login: PASS - User can register and login successfully
features_tested.admin_login_dashboard: PASS - Admin can login and access admin dashboard
features_tested.support_ticket_creation_viewing: PASS - Users can create and view support tickets
features_tested.admin_support_ticket_reply: PASS - Admin can view tickets and has reply/close options
features_tested.password_change: PASS - Password change endpoint validates current password and new password length
features_tested.profile_information: PASS - Profile page shows email, username, first name, last name, phone, date of birth
features_tested.bank_account_management: PASS - Users can add and delete bank accounts, shown in Settings
features_tested.trade_creation_buy: PASS - Buy trades require wallet address, working correctly
features_tested.trade_creation_sell: PASS - Sell trades require bank account, validation working
features_tested.trade_history: PASS - Shows all trades with status, amount, rate, and filters
features_tested.admin_trades_page: PASS - Shows all trades with user info, payout details (wallet address for BUY, bank account for SELL)
features_tested.admin_users_page: PASS - Shows users with expandable bank accounts section
features_tested.back_to_dashboard_navigation: PASS - All inner pages have 'Back to Dashboard' link

ui_verification.landing_page: Clean design, CTA buttons visible, current BTC rate displayed
ui_verification.sign_in_page: Simple login form with email/password fields
ui_verification.user_dashboard: Stats cards (Total Trades, Pending, Completed), Quick Actions, sidebar navigation
ui_verification.settings_page: Profile info (read-only), Payment Methods with Add Bank modal, Security with Change Password
ui_verification.support_page: Ticket list with status badges, New Ticket modal, ticket detail modal with replies
ui_verification.trade_history: Filter tabs, trade cards with icons showing buy/sell, clear status indicators
ui_verification.p2p_trade: Buy/Sell toggle, 12 crypto options, amount input, wallet address field, rate display
ui_verification.admin_dashboard: Stats (Total Users, Trades, Pending, Completed), Quick Actions links
ui_verification.admin_trades: Filterable table, trade detail modal showing payout info (bank account/wallet)
ui_verification.admin_users: User table with expandable bank accounts row
ui_verification.admin_support: Ticket list, detail modal with Admin Reply textarea and Close Ticket button
